The '''''Quicksilver''''' was a private [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned by [[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]] at the time of the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]. During the war, it was hijacked by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], who used it to transport [[Trade Federation Minister|Minister]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] from [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]]. There, they informed the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] and the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] of the war, and were able to secure [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] assistance, leading to the Republic victory at the [[Fifth Battle of Qotile]].
